series_metadata.series_description: Includes all records pertaining to the issuance of surety bonds including, but not limited to, pre-qualification records, funding verification, financial statements, bond issue documents and all other records filed with and related to the surety bonds.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: six (6) years completion of project or such shorter limitations bring claims if contractually agreed upon. unsuccessful/unfunded applications and unexecuted projects: one (1) year date of last action. Statutory or regulatory provisions applicable certain programs may affect retention of related records. In such cases, statutory or regulatory provisions shall take precedence over retention language set forth in this schedule. Records subject audit shall be further retained audit report is released and discrepancies addressed. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject a litigation hold must be retained hold is lifted by Legal Office, regardless of whether specified retention period has elapsed. ; Paper: period specified electronic format
